title: Dev v0.5.3 Submit Update to Master
notes:
Enables Submit Update to Master so Dev users can package their current item database and notes into a pending Master review submission on GitHub.

Changes:
- Enables Submit Update to Master.
- Adds Submission notes field.
- Creates a pending dev submission package.
- Includes dev name.
- Includes timestamp.
- Includes app version.
- Includes item count and category/location summary.
- Includes full current item snapshot for Master review.
- Saves a local copy of the submission package.
- Uploads pending submission to:
  shared-dev/submissions/pending/<submission-id>.json
- Refresh Shared Database remains available.
- Save All to Shared Database remains available.

GitHub token requirement:
- Repository: ColbyDC/apl-helper-updates
- Permission: Contents Read and write
- Metadata Read-only
